name: Yars' Revenge
description:
Yars' Revenge is a fast-paced shooter set in a vector-graphics style environment. The player controls a Yar, a colorful insect-like creature, who must destroy the evil Qotile. The Qotile is protected by a force field that must be penetrated before the Yar can destroy it with its Zorlon Cannon. 

The Yar can move freely around the screen. A neutral zone exists to the far left of the play area where the Yar is invulnerable to Qotile attacks, but cannot fire. The Qotile will periodically fire a destructive swirl at the Yar. The Yar can absorb energy from the Qotile's shield by touching it. This absorbed energy is necessary to power the Zorlon Cannon.

The Qotile will also rotate and transform into a swirling missile, attacking the Yar directly. When the Qotile is in this form, it is vulnerable to the Zorlon Cannon.

After the Qotile is destroyed, the game repeats, with increased difficulty. When the Qotile is hit by the Zorlon Cannon, an explosion must cover the entire enemy before it is considered destroyed.

controls.z: Consume Qotile shield (fly into the shield)
controls.x: Enter the Neutral Zone (if not already in it)
controls.c: Exit the Neutral Zone (if already in it)
